title: KarnsLib
body:
WIP mod that add Hitbox Types, Particle Shapes, and More.

Current Feature:

Hitbox: returns List of Entity, or LivingEntity, or Player.
- Cubic Hitbox
- Sphere Hitbox
- Cylinder Hitbox
- Line Hitbox

Particle Shapes: Draws various shapes using particles.
- Line by 2 points
- Line by 1 points + rotation + length
- Arc and Circle
- Spiral
- Many more mixed shapes !

Misc
- Local Pos (^ ^ ^ in Minecraft Command)
- UnitVector
